name: diff-view
title: Diff View
description: Compare the last two entries of your clipboard, or two selected files, in VS Code, Cursor, or VSCodium
author: kalaschnik

commands.name: diff-view
commands.title: Show Diff View
commands.description: Compare the last two entries of your clipboard in VS Code, Cursor, or VSCodium

commands.name: open-with-editor
commands.title: Open with Editor
commands.description: Compare the two files selected in Finder in your preferred editor

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
